privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on synthetically generated raw text created by setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output path, 0.5 inch margins, Arial 11pt font, header text ('PI: Smith, John'), and specific section titles ('Specific Aims', 'Significance', 'Innovation', 'Approach') exactly match the task description instructions and verifier.py logic.
